startup.name: Spark Labs & Technologies
startup.overview: Building a multi-product technology startup focused on developing AI-powered solutions, MSME tools, and consumer applications. The platform aims to solve real-world business and user problems through scalable software, including AI chatbots, automation systems, and SaaS products. Currently in development with multiple products being designed for deployment across industries.
startup.outcome: Multi-product pipeline under development, AI chatbot systems in progress, MSME solutions being prototyped.

products.name: AcuLedger
products.description: AcuLedger is a business management and analytics platform designed for MSMEs to manage customers, inventory, invoices, and expenses in a centralized system. It provides real-time insights into revenue, outstanding payments, and operational performance through an interactive dashboard, enabling data-driven decision-making and streamlined business workflows.
